# bumi-mcp

> FastMCP 3.1 MCP for **Noetix Bumi** humanoid: hero specs, OSS/GitHub pointers, optional `BUMI_ROBOT_URL` health ping, virtual-twin composition map (resonite-mcp / robotics-mcp / worldlabs-mcp). No implied low-level motion API until vendor bridge is wired.

## Repo

- https://github.com/sandraschi/bumi-mcp

## Run

- stdio: `uv run python -m bumi_mcp` or `bumi-mcp` entrypoint
- HTTP: `uv run python -m bumi_mcp --serve` → API `10774`, MCP path `/mcp`
- Web: `web_sota/start.ps1` → Vite `10775` (proxies `/api`, `/mcp`)

## Tools

- `bumi(operation=...)` — info | specs | sdk_links | market (Noetix + China humbot + JD / tier-1 retail) | robot_status | virtual_twin | fleet_peers
- `bumi_agentic_workflow(goal)` — sampling (SEP-1577)
- Prompt: `bumi_quick_start`

## Fleet / vbot

Bumi vbot is **composed** from existing MCPs: robotics-mcp, resonite-mcp, unity3d-mcp, blender-mcp, worldlabs-mcp (+ avatar-mcp as needed). See `knowledge.VIRTUAL_TWIN_FLEET` and `data/fleet_default.json`.
